instructions.name: close_chat
docs: Close a legacy chat account and return rent

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury wallet — rent refund destination

instructions.name: close_comment
docs: Close a comment account and return rent

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury wallet — rent refund destination

instructions.name: close_message
docs: Close a legacy message account and return rent

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury wallet — rent refund destination

instructions.name: close_post
docs: Close a post account and return rent to the treasury

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury wallet — rent refund destination

instructions.name: close_profile
docs: Close a profile account and return rent to the treasury

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury wallet — rent refund destination

instructions.name: close_reaction
docs: Close a reaction account and return rent

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury wallet — rent refund destination

accounts.name: payer
docs: Fee payer — treasury for gasless UX

accounts.name: author
docs: The commenter — must be the commenter_profile owner

accounts.name: name_registry
docs: Community-name registry — `init` makes a duplicate name fail: a second
community claiming the same name (even with a different id) aborts the tx.

accounts.name: author
docs: The post author — must be the profile owner

accounts.name: username_registry
docs: Username registry — `init` (not `init_if_needed`) makes a duplicate username
fail: claiming an already-taken handle aborts the transaction.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Fee payer — can be a server keypair for gasless UX

accounts.name: post
docs: The post PDA — seeded by the author's pubkey, so only the real author's post is found

accounts.name: author
docs: Must be the original author — if anyone else signs, the seed/constraint check fails

accounts.name: payer
docs: Fee payer — can be a server keypair for gasless UX

accounts.name: user
docs: Must be the profile owner — prevents others from kicking members

accounts.name: like_record
docs: One LikeRecord PDA per (post, liker) — init will fail if they've already liked

accounts.name: user
docs: The liker — must be the profile owner (read-only, no SOL needed)

accounts.name: payer
docs: Treasury pays for like_record rent

instructions.name: migrate_profile
docs: Resize an existing profile account to the current schema size.
This is needed when the Profile struct grows (e.g. adding follower/following counts).

accounts.name: user
docs: The reactor — must be the reactor_profile owner

accounts.name: sender
docs: Message sender — must be a participant in the chat

accounts.name: payer
docs: Fee payer — treasury for gasless UX

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury wallet — rent refund destination

accounts.name: payer
docs: Fee payer — treasury pays for realloc rent in gasless UX

types.name: CommunityNameRegistry
docs: Reservation account proving a community name is taken (PDA seeded by the name).

types.name: UsernameRegistry
docs: Reservation account proving a username is taken. Its PDA is seeded by the
username itself, so it can exist at most once per handle — that single-init
constraint is what enforces username uniqueness.
